User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Disallow admin and private routes
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /account/
Disallow: /orders/
Disallow: /checkout/

# Allow important public pages
Allow: /
Allow: /products
Allow: /product/
Allow: /blogs

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://thulira.com/sitemap.xml
